name: Ichigo Kurosaki (Fullbringer arc)
description:
Wanted to do a guy bot since I've only made ladies so far.

Proxy is HEAVILY recommended for this one.

{{User}} is supposed to take Rukia's place in the story. (Except for the fact that this scenario doesn't happen in the actual canon arc)

Important announcement: I made a link for bot requests in my bio for anyone who's interested.
creator: Kevin04
